site_name: Free Online Tools - Random Picker, QR Generator & More | ToolVerse
site_description: ToolVerse offers free, fast, install-free online tools including random pickers, text processors, and developer utilities to boost your productivity.
hero_sub: Free, fast, no installation needed. From random pickers to text tools, all in one place.
coming_soon_desc: More tools are on the way
tool_random_picker_desc: A versatile random picker with custom entries, weighted probability, and replacement modes
tool_random_picker_longdesc: ToolVerse Random Picker makes random draws easy for raffles, name picking, and more. Enter custom items or generate numbered sets, assign different probability weights, choose replace or no-replace mode, and pick from slot-machine or flip-card animations.
tool_random_picker_meta_title: Random Picker Wheel - Free Online Name & Item Randomizer | ToolVerse
tool_random_picker_meta_desc: Free online random picker — custom entries, weighted probability, replacement modes, slot-machine and flip animations.
picker_input_placeholder:
Enter one item per line, e.g.:
Alice
Bob
Charlie
picker_weight_hint: Leave empty for equal probability. Higher numbers = higher chance.
picker_all_drawn: All items drawn. Reset to continue.
tool_random_picker_keywords: random picker wheel,name picker,item randomizer,random name generator,random draw tool
picker_error_empty: Please enter at least one item
picker_error_count: Draw count cannot exceed remaining items
faq_a1: Without replacement means each drawn item is removed from the pool and won't appear again, ensuring every item is picked at most once. Ideal for fair raffles or attendance calls.
faq_q2: How do I set different probabilities?
faq_a2: Enable "Custom Weights" and enter a number for each item. Higher numbers mean higher chances. For example, if A = 2 and B = 1, A has roughly a 2/3 chance of being picked.
faq_q3: Can I generate a numbered set automatically?
faq_a3: Yes. Switch to the "Numbered Set" tab, set your start and end numbers and an optional prefix, then click Generate. Great for seat numbers, contestant IDs, and more.
tool_qr_generator_desc: Generate QR codes for URLs, text, and more — custom colors, size, and error correction
tool_qr_generator_longdesc: ToolVerse QR Code Generator lets you create QR codes instantly in your browser — no upload, no server. Enter any URL or text, adjust size, pick colors, set error correction level, and download a crisp PNG in one click.
tool_qr_generator_meta_title: QR Code Generator Free - Create Custom QR Codes Online | ToolVerse
tool_qr_generator_meta_desc: Free online QR code generator — create QR codes for URLs, text, and more. Custom size, colors, and error correction. Download as PNG instantly.
qr_input_placeholder: Enter a URL or any text…
qr_ec_hint_l: L — 7% recovery. Smallest and simplest pattern.
qr_ec_hint_m: M — 15% recovery. Good for most uses.
qr_ec_hint_q: Q — 25% recovery. Recommended for printed materials.
qr_ec_hint_h: H — 30% recovery. Best for QR codes with logo overlays.
qr_tip_contrast: Ensure high contrast between foreground and background for reliable scanning.
qr_tip_local: All processing happens locally in your browser — nothing is uploaded.
qr_tip_size: Use 256px+ for print. 128px is fine for digital display.
qr_error_too_long: Content too long for this error correction level. Try level L or shorten the text.
qr_faq_a1: A QR (Quick Response) code is a 2D barcode that encodes text, URLs, or other data. Smartphones can scan them instantly with the camera app — no special reader needed.
qr_faq_a2: Error correction allows a QR code to be read even if part of it is damaged or covered. L=7%, M=15%, Q=25%, H=30% of the code can be obscured and still scan. Higher levels produce a denser pattern — use H if you plan to add a logo overlay.
qr_faq_a3: Yes. Pick any foreground and background color. Make sure there is strong contrast between the two for scanners to reliably detect the pattern.
qr_faq_a4: Completely. The QR code is generated entirely inside your browser using JavaScript. No data is sent to any server.
tool_qr_generator_keywords: qr code generator,qr code maker,free qr generator,custom qr code,qr code online
picker_error_start_gt_end: Start number cannot be greater than end number

tool_timestamp_converter_desc: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates — supports seconds and milliseconds
tool_timestamp_converter_longdesc: ToolVerse Unix Timestamp Converter lets you instantly convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates. Whether you're debugging, parsing logs, or working with APIs, this tool handles both second and millisecond timestamps with live updating and one-click copy.
tool_timestamp_converter_meta_title: Unix Timestamp Converter - Epoch to Date Online | ToolVerse
tool_timestamp_converter_meta_desc: Free online Unix timestamp converter — convert between timestamps and dates instantly. Supports seconds and milliseconds.
tool_timestamp_converter_keywords: unix timestamp converter,epoch converter,timestamp to date,date to timestamp,unix time converter
ts_error_invalid: Invalid timestamp — must be a positive integer
ts_faq_a1: A Unix timestamp is the number of seconds (or milliseconds) that have elapsed since January 1, 1970 00:00:00 UTC, also known as the Unix epoch. It is widely used in programming for storing and comparing dates in a timezone-independent way.
ts_faq_a2: The Year 2038 problem affects systems that store Unix timestamps as signed 32-bit integers. The maximum value (2,147,483,647) corresponds to January 19, 2038. After this date, the value overflows. Most modern systems use 64-bit integers, avoiding this issue.
ts_faq_a3: Yes. All timestamp conversions are computed entirely in your browser using JavaScript. No data is ever sent to any server, so the tool works perfectly offline once the page is loaded.
ts_faq_a4: All conversions happen locally in your browser — no data is uploaded.
og_timestamp_converter_title: Unix Timestamp Converter - Epoch to Date Online | ToolVerse
og_timestamp_converter_desc: Free online Unix timestamp converter. Convert timestamps to dates and vice versa. Supports seconds and milliseconds.
tool_favicon_generator_desc: Upload any image and generate favicon.ico, PNG icons in all standard sizes, and SVG favicons — free & local processing
tool_favicon_generator_longdesc: ToolVerse Favicon Generator creates all the icon files your website needs from a single image. Upload a logo and instantly download favicon.ico, 16×16/32×32/48×48/180×180 PNGs, and a modern SVG favicon. Everything runs locally in your browser — no uploads, no privacy concerns.
tool_favicon_generator_meta_title: Favicon Generator - Free Online Favicon Maker & ICO Converter | ToolVerse
tool_favicon_generator_meta_desc: Free online favicon generator — upload any image and generate favicon.ico, PNG icons in all sizes, and SVG favicons instantly in your browser.
tool_favicon_generator_keywords: favicon generator,favicon maker,ico converter,website icon generator,favicon.ico generator,PNG to ICO,icon maker
fv_drop_hint: Drag & drop or click to upload
fv_drop_formats: PNG, SVG, JPG, WebP, GIF — recommended ≥260×260px
fv_html_hint: Copy this HTML to your <head> after uploading icons to your site:
fv_empty_hint: Upload an image to see generated favicons
fv_error_format: Unsupported format. Use PNG, SVG, JPG, WebP, or GIF.
fv_faq_a1: A favicon (favorite icon) is the small icon that appears in browser tabs, bookmarks, and search results next to your website's name. It helps users identify your site at a glance and is essential for brand recognition.
fv_faq_a2: Modern websites need: favicon.ico (multi-size, 16+32+48px), favicon-16x16.png, favicon-32x32.png, apple-touch-icon.png (180×180px), and optionally favicon.svg (SVG vector icon for modern browsers). You can download all from this tool.
fv_faq_q3: Can I use SVG as a favicon?
fv_faq_a3: Yes! Chrome, Firefox, and Edge all support SVG favicons. They look crisp at any size and are tiny in file size. It's best to still provide a favicon.ico as fallback for older browsers that don't support SVG favicons.
fv_faq_q4: Is my image uploaded to a server?
fv_faq_a4: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser using the Canvas API and JavaScript. Your image never leaves your computer. You can even use this tool offline once the page is loaded.
og_favicon_generator_title: Favicon Generator - Free Online Favicon Maker & ICO Converter | ToolVerse
og_favicon_generator_desc: Generate favicons from any image — upload PNG, SVG, or JPG and get favicon.ico, 16/32/48/180px PNGs, and SVG favicons. All processed in your browser.
